name: The Undead
description: You serve an immortal undead patron and channel deathly power.

1.name: Form of Dread
1.description: Transform to gain temporary hit points and frighten enemies when you hit.

1.name: Expanded Spell List
1.description: The Undead adds necrotic and fear-based spells to your warlock options.

6.name: Grave Touched
6.description: Your attacks can become necrotic and you do not need to eat, drink, or breathe while transformed.

10.name: Necrotic Husk
10.description: When reduced to 0 HP, explode with necrotic energy and drop to 1 HP once per rest.

14.name: Spirit Projection
14.description: Project your spirit from your body, gaining movement and damage benefits.
